work_unit: Full deep audit: server/routes/storage/cache + engine/fetchers/calibration + scripts/social/cron
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete (PA audit-045 all fixes resolved). Triggered new full deep audit per autonomous-constraints.md A节. Selected sunset-prediction as next unaudited project (personal-assistant, autonomous-studio, wechat-main, autonomous-engine already audited in recent cycles).
action: Ran 3 parallel sonnet sub-agents to deep-read all code files across 3 layers: (1) server+routes+storage+cache, (2) prediction-engine+fetchers+calibration+cities+date-utils+contour-builder, (3) scripts (mail_push, xhs_keepalive, post_xhs_browseruse, publish-xhs, xhs-content, xhs-daily, social-calibrate, social-scraper, copy-generator, cron shell, checkpoint_wal, health-check). Produced consolidated audit report with 41 findings.
outcome_evidence: Audit report written to .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-08-046.md (41 findings: 6H/19M/12L/4I). audit-cycle-state.json updated: status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=20 route-fixes, 17 structural debts queued, 3 direction-shifts deferred. History entry added.
next_suggestion: Dispatch P0 route-fix SP-ENG-H-001 (calibration.js UTC→CST date shift) — highest impact data corruption bug
Batch SP-ENG-H-001 + SP-ENG-H-002 into single fix case (same file, same root cause: missing localDateCST import)
Then dispatch SP-ENG-H-003 (NaN weight acceptance) and SP-SRV-H-001 (shell injection) as separate cases

audit_findings.finding: Shell command injection via BROWSER_USE_POST_LIMIT env var in exec()
audit_findings.remediation: Use execFile with validated integer arg

audit_findings.finding: GET /predictions?date= lacks YYYY-MM-DD format validation
audit_findings.remediation: Add regex check matching POST /social/fetch pattern

audit_findings.finding: UTC toISOString() date key shifts by -1 day during CST 00:00-07:59
runDailyCalibration yesterday calc also UTC-shifted
setWeights silently accepts NaN weights (typeof NaN===number passes)
Cookie storage_state written plaintext with default umask
Non-atomic .env rewrite can truncate credentials on concurrent cron
TTLCache never evicts stale entries, unbounded memory growth
Cache loading blind-wait setTimeout(2000) causes thundering herd
POST /social/fetch unauthenticated DoS vector
POST /xhs/generate unauthenticated script execution
502 responses leak err.message to client
No CORS/Helmet/rate-limit middleware
computeWeightsFromPairs NaN when all errors Infinity
fetchJSON no request timeout across 3 fetchers
80-city batch near API limit, no chunking
Only retries 429, transient network errors throw
gaussian sigma=0 division by zero → NaN
SMTP_PORT int conversion crashes on empty env
SMTP send no retry, QQ transient errors permanent fail
Chrome/120 UA hardcoded, 30 versions behind
ESM file uses require('fs') → ReferenceError
HEALTH_LOG non-atomic read-append-write race
fetch API no timeout, localhost hang blocks forever
fuser -k kills port holder without verification
WAL checkpoint no busy_timeout, TRUNCATE silently fails
Post record non-atomic write, crash leaves corrupt JSON
better-sqlite3 sync I/O blocks event loop
DB connection never closed, WAL uncheckpointed on SIGTERM
Hand-rolled .env parser breaks on quoted/special values
Missing set -eo pipefail
MAIL_TO unbound under set -u after source in set +u block
FETCH_DELAY_MS=1800ms no jitter, identifiable pattern
exec URL template literal unescaped in shell
No exception handling or file logging in cron script
copytree silently skips dangling symlinks
Empty points produce empty GeoJSON with no metadata marker
extractSunsetWindowData assumes daily.sunset[0] exists
Serial weather/AQ requests within batch, ~15.6s pure wait
loading Set no timeout self-healing
localDateCST available but unused by calibration.js
